# UX Requirements Quality Checklist: 2026 FIFA World Cup Player Data Dashboard

**Purpose**: Validate UX and visual design requirements for completeness, clarity, and testability
**Created**: 2026-06-13
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are the exact chart types for each of the 8 analysis sections explicitly specified? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001–FR-008]
- [x] CHK002 Are spacing/grid requirements defined for the responsive card layout (gap sizes, column counts per breakpoint)? [Gap, Spec §FR-010]
- [x] CHK003 Is the sticky nav bar's visual appearance specified (background, height, font, active-section highlight)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-014]
- [x] CHK004 Are color palette requirements defined for both dark and light modes across all chart types? [Gap, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK005 Are typography specifications documented (font family, sizing scale, heading vs label hierarchy)? [Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is "visually rich dashboard" quantified with specific expectations about chart density or information hierarchy? [Ambiguity, Spec §US1]
- [x] CHK007 Is "graceful error state" defined with specific visual layout and messaging requirements? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011]
- [x] CHK008 Are "skeleton or spinner" loading states disambiguated — which one should be used, or are both options left to the implementer? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-012]
- [x] CHK009 Is the dark/light mode toggle's placement and appearance specified? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK010 Are the visual requirements for "chart card" consistent — do all cards share the same border radius, shadow, padding, and header style? [Ambiguity, Spec §US1-AS1]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK011 Do the responsive requirements in FR-010 align with the 375px minimum stated in US1-AS2 and SC-003? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, §US1-AS2, §SC-003]
- [x] CHK012 Are hover state requirements for charts (tooltips) consistent with the mobile-first principle, given that mobile has no hover? [Consistency, Spec §US1, §Constitution IV]
- [x] CHK013 Does the "single page with scrolling sections" assumption conflict with FR-014's sticky nav anchor links regarding scroll behavior (smooth vs instant)? [Conflict, Spec §Assumptions, §FR-014]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK014 Can "fully readable" in SC-003 be objectively measured (e.g., minimum font size, contrast ratio)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]
- [ ] CHK015 Is the "3 seconds" load time in SC-002 measurable across all network conditions, or only on the specified 10 Mbps connection? [Clarity, Spec §SC-002]
- [x] CHK016 Can "identify at least 3 key insights within 15 seconds" in SC-001 be tested without bias (what qualifies as a "key insight")? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK017 Are UX requirements defined for the transition between dark and light modes (fade, instant, or animation)? [Gap, Spec §FR-009, §SC-004]
- [x] CHK018 Are accessibility requirements specified for chart interactions (keyboard navigation, screen reader labels, focus order)? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK019 Are UX requirements defined for the searchable dropdown's interaction states (empty input, no results, loading)? [Gap, Spec §Clarifications]
- [x] CHK020 Are requirements defined for what happens when the user is at an intermediate breakpoint between mobile and desktop? [Coverage, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK021 Is the visual treatment of "footnote for excluded players" in market value charts specified? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
